title: The North Wind & The Robin
content:
The north wind doth blow
    And we shall have snow,
    And what will poor Robin do then--poor thing?
    He'll sit in a barn
    To keep himself warm,
    And hide his head under his wing--poor thing!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Walter Crane delivers a powerful performance in "The North Wind & The Robin"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
